name: ger40_m15_ema_pullback_trend
hypothesis: On GER40 M15 during European cash session, pullbacks to EMA(20) within an established EMA(20)>EMA(50) trend and ADX>22 resume in the trend direction with positive expectancy. This replaces the failed Donchian breakout by entering on retracements (not breakouts) with a regime gate.

entry_rules.long: EMA20>EMA50>EMA200 AND ADX(14)>22 AND low <= EMA20 AND close > EMA20 AND RSI(14) between 40 and 65 AND session_active
entry_rules.short: EMA20<EMA50<EMA200 AND ADX(14)>22 AND high >= EMA20 AND close < EMA20 AND RSI(14) between 35 and 60 AND session_active

exit_rules.sl: 1.5 * ATR(14) beyond EMA50 on entry side
exit_rules.trailing: after partial, trail remainder at 1.5 * ATR(14)
